title: Revamped Vanilla+
description: A revamped Vanilla+ experience using mods that aren't so overwhelming to create a fresh Vanilla+ Experience
body:
This is my first modpack which I called it **Revamped Vanilla+** This will get you countless of hours of fun without adding so much mods that make it overwhelming, as it contains more mods that add little QOL features rather than mostly being content mods. Although it does include content mods and some of them are:

- Farmer's Delight
- Fabric's Season's
- Spelunkery
- Galosphere
- Artifacts
- Creeper Overhaul
- Inmmersive Vehicles
- Immersive Weathering
- Nyf's Spider's
- Better Archeology
- Deeper & Darker
  
  
**& Much Much More**

# Some Requirements

**6-8GB of Ram** is something I reccomend to run it well

the **resourcepacks** are not required but strongly encouraged

**Shrimple** or **Complimentary reimagined** are reccomended shaders but you can use any

You don't have to use shaders 

**If you have any issues let me know or report them**

_Just letting you know this modpack is currently on beta as I'm workig on title screens, menu's and loading screens, and bug fixxing atm !!!_
# Hope you enjoy!
